## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion between Stage Six and GrowthX to negotiate terms for a potential marketing engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/F4DM-46QJhfxh1b8xP4JDEqgfkkFSZMs?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Stage Six has a budget cap of $20-24K for a 3-month pilot, aiming for 15 marketing qualified leads](https://fathom.video/share/F4DM-46QJhfxh1b8xP4JDEqgfkkFSZMs?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [GrowthX typically offers an 8-week strategy sprint with potential for opt-out, priced at $10K/month](https://fathom.video/share/F4DM-46QJhfxh1b8xP4JDEqgfkkFSZMs?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Tension between Stage Six's need for quick results and GrowthX's typical timeline for organic content ROI](https://fathom.video/share/F4DM-46QJhfxh1b8xP4JDEqgfkkFSZMs?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [Potential for a modified 3-month engagement, but pricing may need to increase to $30K](https://fathom.video/share/F4DM-46QJhfxh1b8xP4JDEqgfkkFSZMs?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)

## Topics

### Budget and Timeline Constraints

  - [Stage Six has a max budget of $20-24K for a 3-month pilot](https://fathom.video/share/F4DM-46QJhfxh1b8xP4JDEqgfkkFSZMs?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [Need to demonstrate results (15 MQLs) before setting up auto-renewal](https://fathom.video/share/F4DM-46QJhfxh1b8xP4JDEqgfkkFSZMs?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [Nathanael emphasizes need for "maximum firepower" in a 3-month period](https://fathom.video/share/F4DM-46QJhfxh1b8xP4JDEqgfkkFSZMs?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [GrowthX typically structures 8-week strategy sprints at $10K/month](https://fathom.video/share/F4DM-46QJhfxh1b8xP4JDEqgfkkFSZMs?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)

### ROI Expectations and Timelines

  - [GrowthX typically sees notable traffic uptick by early month 3 post-publishing](https://fathom.video/share/F4DM-46QJhfxh1b8xP4JDEqgfkkFSZMs?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [Engagement and conversion metrics usually become clear by months 4-5](https://fathom.video/share/F4DM-46QJhfxh1b8xP4JDEqgfkkFSZMs?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Recent success with Airbyte: quick LLM pickup of fresh content led to conversions](https://fathom.video/share/F4DM-46QJhfxh1b8xP4JDEqgfkkFSZMs?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Tension between Stage Six's need for quick wins and organic content's medium/long-term ROI](https://fathom.video/share/F4DM-46QJhfxh1b8xP4JDEqgfkkFSZMs?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)

### Negotiation Points

  - [Kyle suggests Marcel might agree to 3 months at $30K (maintaining $10K/month rate)](https://fathom.video/share/F4DM-46QJhfxh1b8xP4JDEqgfkkFSZMs?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [Nathanael's budget cap makes $30K challenging, but emphasizes Stage Six's growth potential](https://fathom.video/share/F4DM-46QJhfxh1b8xP4JDEqgfkkFSZMs?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [Discussion of modified sprint or engagement structure to meet Stage Six's needs](https://fathom.video/share/F4DM-46QJhfxh1b8xP4JDEqgfkkFSZMs?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)

### Stage Six's Market Position

  - [New laws mandating use of Stage Six's type of product](https://fathom.video/share/F4DM-46QJhfxh1b8xP4JDEqgfkkFSZMs?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Company has "fumbled" targeting but has strong product loved by customers](https://fathom.video/share/F4DM-46QJhfxh1b8xP4JDEqgfkkFSZMs?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
  - [Nathanael hired alongside new COO to shift company direction](https://fathom.video/share/F4DM-46QJhfxh1b8xP4JDEqgfkkFSZMs?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [High growth potential with proper execution](https://fathom.video/share/F4DM-46QJhfxh1b8xP4JDEqgfkkFSZMs?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)

### Next Steps and Communication

  - [Kyle to discuss with Marcel and follow up before leaving for vacation](https://fathom.video/share/F4DM-46QJhfxh1b8xP4JDEqgfkkFSZMs?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
  - [Nathanael provided WhatsApp number for urgent communication: 1-213-986-7345](https://fathom.video/share/F4DM-46QJhfxh1b8xP4JDEqgfkkFSZMs?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [Kyle to ensure Nathanael receives recording of upcoming workshop](https://fathom.video/share/F4DM-46QJhfxh1b8xP4JDEqgfkkFSZMs?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
